##NAMES=Walstromite
##RRUFFID=R150079
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=BaCa_2_Si_3_O_9_
##LOCALITY=Gun Claim, Yukon Territory, Canada
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Gunnar Farber
##DESCRIPTION=Colorless granular or short prismatic crystals with good cleavage, associated with suzukiite (R150039), pellyite (R150078), and bavsiite.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R150079
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 6.741 b: 9.601 c: 6.683 alpha: 69.78 beta: 102.35 gamma: 96.87 volume: 396 crystal system: triclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
